inputs.price_source: Yahoo Finance FLY regular market price 2026-07-18
inputs.shares_source: 159,639 thousand weighted-average diluted shares Q1 2026 (10-Q Q1 2026)
inputs.fcf_source: Normalized owner cash per share after growth capital spending and integration drag; FY2025 OCF $204.9M ($1.28/sh at ~160M shares) includes milestone/deferred-revenue timing and IPO-period collections not equal to run-rate equity free cash (10-K FY2025); Q1 2026 operating loss ($95.7M) and net loss ($96.7M) on revenue $80.9M (10-Q Q1 2026)
inputs.rpo_source: $652.6M remaining performance obligations; 36.9% expected within 12 months (10-Q Q1 2026 revenue note)
inputs.scitec_acquisition_source: SciTec purchase price allocation total assets $652.2M; acquisition closed October 2025 (10-K FY2025 / 10-Q Q1 2026)
inputs.milestone_billing_note: Company states ~90% of contract value typically collected before launch (10-K Item 1 Business)
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence starting owner cash $0.35/sh is a haircut to filing OCF per share, not Q1 net loss. Backlog conversion and Eclipse/Alpha cadence must lift margins before moat and dhando strengthen.

marvin_floor.notes: Normalized owner cash after growth capex; filings only for revenue, RPO, cash

blended_best.notes: Marvin floor only; no approved third-party blend

bear.notes: Launch failure or regulatory delay; Eclipse slips; SciTec integration costs; RPO slippage; warrant overhang

base.notes: RPO converts on stated cadence; Alpha cadence improves; SciTec defense software cross-sell; gross margin expands from Q1 21.6% base

bull.notes: National security budget tailwind; Eclipse on time; international pad (Sweden) opens; firm-fixed-price mix scales with ~90% pre-launch collections

segments.label: Launch services (Alpha, Eclipse)
segments.evidence: Alpha small-lift vehicle; Eclipse medium-lift with Northrop Grumman Antares heritage; L3Harris multi-launch agreement up to 20 Alpha missions (10-K Item 1)

segments.label: Spacecraft (Blue Ghost, Elytra)
segments.evidence: Blue Ghost lunar lander and Elytra orbital vehicles; NASA CLPS and defense missions cited in 10-K business description

segments.label: Defense software & sensing (SciTec)
segments.evidence: SciTec acquired October 2025; classified infrastructure, modeling/simulation, mission operations (10-K Item 1; 10-Q SciTec PPA)

options.label: Remaining performance obligations
options.base_terminal_rationale: RPO $652.6M conversion modeled in segment growth years 1-5, not separate terminal row
options.evidence: RPO $652.6M at March 31, 2026; 36.9% within 12 months (10-Q Q1 2026)

options.label: Eclipse medium-lift vehicle (pre-revenue)
options.base_terminal_rationale: Eclipse still in development; Northrop Grumman partnership and $50M equity investment are milestones, not Lawrence base cash flow yet
options.evidence: 10-K risk factors cite Eclipse development and regulatory timing; Northrop partnership disclosed Item 1

corporate_drag.notes: Interest expense modest ($3.6M Q1 2026); primary drag is R&D ($67.5M Q1) not debt service

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Goodwill and intangibles from SciTec ($433M goodwill per PPA table, 10-Q); equity $1.19B vs price-implied ~$3.1B market cap

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / pipeline?
option_scan.evidence: Eclipse vehicle in development; international launch pads (Sweden, Wallops) under construction (10-K Item 1)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Q1 2026 operating loss ($95.7M) on revenue $80.9M; R&D $67.5M (10-Q Q1 2026)

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Public Nasdaq issuer post-IPO; no hidden private stake marks in filings

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No royalty-trust or litigation recovery pattern

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Milestone billing accelerates cash vs P&L; ~90% pre-launch collection is working-capital option embedded in launch segment

optionality_gate.notes: RPO $652.6M ÷ 160M ≈ $4.08/sh is contracted backlog not owner cash; backlog informs bull sensitivity only

evidence_refresh.notes: Defense/space launch backlog context; Lawrence base 2.2% is stance gate

stance_proposal.override_reason: RPO $652.6M and milestone billing are real, but Q1 2026 operating loss ($95.7M) on $80.9M revenue, SciTec integration, and Eclipse development risk cap moat and dhando. Lawrence base IRR ~2.2% at $19.27 on normalized $0.35/sh owner cash.

growth_explanation.mechanism: RPO conversion on Alpha/Eclipse cadence plus SciTec defense software cross-sell; gross margin expansion from Q1 21.6%
growth_explanation.falsifier: Two consecutive quarters of operating loss widening vs revenue growth without RPO conversion

theory_implied.derivation: segment_build owner-cash weighted blend (growth only; exit from scenarios.base)

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Operating-only fallback. Add an explicit component_valuation schedule before drawing asset-level conclusions.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

component_groups.label: Operating business (fallback)
component_groups.adjustments: Risk and timing are reflected in the low/base/high range.

valuation_proof.adjustment: Risk and timing are reflected in the low/base/high range.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.

valuation_method_route.label: Predictable cash-flow security
failure_modes: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

economic_ownership_map.label: Operating business (fallback)

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Risk and timing are reflected in the low/base/high range.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.

method_route.label: Predictable cash-flow security
failure_modes: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only the terminal multiple.

blockers: A complete, explicit ownership/component schedule has not been supplied.

falsifiers: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material economic claim is valued exactly once and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
